title: Dragonslayer Sword
body:
Introducing the Dragon Slayer Sword mod for Minecraft. I'm finally updating this mod with the features I have in my other version of this with variations added by fans of this mod. Make sure to join my discord for more info on mod development. If you want more content like custom mobs or even the eclipse dimension check out my other mod [Eclipsecraft](https://modrinth.com/mod/eclipsecraft)

![fb](https://i.imgur.com/sQrJK7P.png)

Want to support mod development? Check our our BuyMeACoffee or Patreon. Every donation is extremly appriciated.

![fb](https://i.imgur.com/sQrJK7P.png)

Commands:

The command /dsdifficulty has 4 options for making the sword and armor weaker/stronger

The command /dragonslayer tells you in a criptic way how close you are to awakening the behelit

![fb](https://i.imgur.com/sQrJK7P.png)

Current Recipes:

Dragonslayer

Video Tutorial on [Alloy](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=S-aEusJS3RU&t=5s)

I'll go in order for what you need to do to make this, it's not meant to be easy since it's kinda op


1. Scrap Alloy is needed to make the next item

![Scrap](https://i.ibb.co/X8rg04t/scrap-alloy.png)

2. put the Scrap Alloy in a furnace to get the alloy

![hot alloy](https://i.ibb.co/1RRR1LJ/hot-alloy-block.png)

3. place the Hot Alloy Block in water to quench it and then mine it to get the Alloy Block

![alloy](https://i.ibb.co/MM2TTd8/ezgif-com-video-to-gif-converter.gif)

4. Make Dragonslayer

![dragonslayer](https://i.ibb.co/d2RTLSm/dragonslayer.png)
